emails.subject: FuelCell Schedule 13d Memo
emails.body: Kay, please read this memo...Because you will be working with the originators and will be the first lawyer to know when the condition of the orders is filled you are probably the right person to blow the whistle for the 13D filing...Let me know if you think otherwise Forwarded by Dan Lyons/HOU/ECT on 10/09/2000 11:09 AM "Scott Miller" <smiller@bracepatt.com> 10/05/2000 02:17 PM
